alerts.title: Spain joins growing list of countries shutting out Polymarket and Kalshi
Spain blocks Polymarket, Kalshi for operating without licenses amid widening global crackdown on prediction markets
alerts.summary: Spain blocked Polymarket and Kalshi on May 26, the latest in a growing wave of international crackdowns on prediction markets.

alerts.title: Spain Blocks Prediction Markets Kalshi, Polymarket for Potential Gambling Law Violations
alerts.summary: Spain is the latest country to clamp down on the rising use of prediction market platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi.

alerts.title: Indonesia Blocks Polymarket After Bets on President’s Early Departure
alerts.summary: The ban came on the heels of markets linked to the early departure of Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto.

alerts.title: Hyperliquid takes a swing at Polymarket with macro outcome bets
Liquid launches Co-Invest app, bringing AI-powered live trade execution into ChatGPT and Claude
alerts.summary: Co-Invest supports crypto, equities, FX, Polymarket positions and pre-IPO secondaries across over 500 markets, according to Liquid.

alerts.title: Hyperliquid rolls out validator-governed prediction markets for real-world events
alerts.summary: The markets will be published through automated newsfeed software and governed by validators, the team said.
